heroHeadline: Sheinbaum at 542 Days: USMCA Talks Open, Cuba Defiance, World Cup Playoffs Begin
heroSubtitle: Mexico's first female president holds firm on Cuban medical workers despite U.S. pressure, launches USMCA bilateral review with Washington, champions Michelle Bachelet for UN chief, and hosts FIFA World Cup qualification playoffs as post-El Mencho security scrutiny intensifies.
footerNote: Data sourced from Diario Oficial, INEGI, Banco de México, SNSP, Secretaría de Economía, Reuters, AP, El Universal, Reforma, Animal Político, Wilson Center, AS/COA, Al Jazeera, Washington Post, Chatham House
